name: Battle Blast
author: Poki
description: Battle Blast is an action-packed shooting game where you run, gun, and jetpack your way to victory! Grab your favorite weapon, explore the map, team up with fellow humans, and take down waves of evil clankers. Aim sharp, shoot fast, and soar through the air with your jetpack for the ultimate combat advantage. Ready to blast off and win the war? How to play Battle Blast? Walk: WASD or the arrow keys Fly: the space bar Shoot: left click Sprint: Shift Change weapons: the number key Change view: P Who created Battle Blast? Battle Blast is created by No Pressure Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Crazy Bikes , Fear Response , School Bus Demolition Derby , Rocket Soccer Derby , Demolition Derby Crash Racing , Bossy Toss , Shape Rush , Crazy Cars , Crazy Cars , Stickman Climb! and Stickman Climb 2 ! How can I play Battle Blast for free? You can play Battle Blast for free on Poki. Can I play Battle Blast on mobile devices and desktop? Battle Blast can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
